sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect information you provide directly to us when you create an account, update your profile, post content, send messages, book events, or contact support. This may include your name, username, email address, profile photo, phone number (if provided), and any content you upload such as photos, comments, and messages. We also collect information about your activity within the App, including follows, unfollows, saved posts, blocked users, hidden content, messages sent, and event bookings. Additionally, we automatically collect certain information such as device information, IP address, log data, and usage information.

sections.title: How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use the information we collect to operate, maintain, and improve PineApple. This includes managing your account, enabling photo sharing and messaging features, facilitating event bookings, personalizing your experience, responding to support requests, monitoring misuse, and ensuring the safety and security of the App.

sections.title: User-Generated Content
sections.content: Content you post, including photos, comments, and messages, may be visible to other users depending on your privacy settings. We store and process this content to provide the core functionality of the App. You are responsible for the information you choose to share.

sections.title: Messaging and Safety Monitoring
sections.content: To maintain a safe environment, we may monitor, review, or investigate user content and communications when necessary to enforce our policies, comply with legal obligations, or protect users and the integrity of the App.

sections.title: Information Sharing
sections.content: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your information with trusted service providers who assist us in operating the App, such as hosting providers, analytics services, or security partners. We may also disclose information if required by law or to protect our rights, users, and platform.

sections.title: Analytics and Tracking Technologies
sections.content: We may use third-party analytics tools to understand how users interact with the App and to improve performance and features. We may also use cookies or similar technologies to enhance user experience and maintain session functionality.

sections.title: Push Notifications
sections.content: We may send push notifications related to account activity, messages, updates, and event bookings. You can manage or disable push notifications through your device settings.

sections.title: Event Bookings
sections.content: When you book an event through PineApple, we collect and process the information necessary to facilitate the booking. PineApple does not process payments and is not responsible for agreements made outside the App.

sections.title: Data Retention
sections.content: We retain your information for as long as your account remains active or as necessary to provide our services. Certain information may be retained for legal, security, or legitimate business purposes.

sections.title: Account Deletion
sections.content: You may request deletion of your account and personal data at any time through the App settings or by contacting support. Upon deletion, we will remove or anonymize your personal information unless retention is required by law or for legitimate security purposes.

sections.title: Data Security
sections.content: We implement reasonable administrative, technical, and physical safeguards designed to protect your personal information. However, no method of transmission or storage is completely secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

sections.title: Your Rights and Choices
sections.content: You may access, update, or correct your account information at any time through the App. Depending on your location, you may have additional rights under applicable data protection laws, including the right to request access, correction, deletion, or restriction of your personal data.

sections.title: Children's Privacy
sections.content: PineApple is not intended for children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If we become aware that such information has been collected, we will take appropriate steps to delete it.

sections.title: International Data Transfers
sections.content: Your information may be transferred to and processed in countries outside your residence. By using the App, you consent to such transfers in accordance with this Privacy Policy.

sections.title: Changes to This Policy
sections.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify users of material changes by updating the 'Last Updated' date and posting the revised policy within the App.

sections.title: Contact Us
sections.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at support@pineappleapp.com.
